lessons.english: Good morning, I'm Louis Lin, Senior Manager of R&D and Engineering.
lessons.chinese: 早安，我是林祿偉，研發與工程部門的資深經理。
lessons.scenario: 第一次與外國訪客或新同事見面時的自我介紹

lessons.english: Let's touch base next week to see how the project is going.
lessons.chinese: 我們下週簡單聯絡一下，看看專案進度如何。
lessons.scenario: 和同事或客戶約定後續追蹤時的口語說法

lessons.english: Welcome to BFY Corporation. We specialize in food manufacturing.
lessons.chinese: 歡迎來到貝特福優公司。我們專精於食品製造。
lessons.scenario: 帶外賓參觀工廠或接待客戶時的開場白

lessons.english: We've come too far to give up now. Let's finish what we started.
lessons.chinese: 我們都走這麼遠了，現在不能放棄。把開始的事做完吧。

vocabulary.meaning: 已經走了很遠、付出很多

lessons.scenario: 電影風格：團隊陷入低潮時的激勵台詞

lessons.english: Our facility is located in Yilan, Taiwan, and we produce snack foods.
lessons.chinese: 我們的廠房位於台灣宜蘭，生產休閒零食。
lessons.scenario: 向外賓介紹公司基本資訊

lessons.english: Did you see the news? AI is becoming a core tool in food factories this year.
lessons.chinese: 你看到新聞了嗎？今年 AI 正成為食品工廠的核心工具。

vocabulary.meaning: 你看到新聞了嗎（聊時事開場）

lessons.scenario: 用時事當話題，和同事或外賓開啟對話

lessons.english: Nice to meet you. Please feel free to ask any questions during the tour.
lessons.chinese: 很高興認識您。參觀過程中請隨時提問。
lessons.scenario: 工廠參觀開始前的禮貌性邀請

lessons.english: Good. It sounds like we're all on the same page about the schedule.
lessons.chinese: 很好，聽起來我們對時程都有共識了。
lessons.scenario: 會議中確認大家想法一致時

lessons.english: Let me introduce you to our production team leader, Mr. Chen.
lessons.chinese: 讓我為您介紹我們的生產線長陳先生。
lessons.scenario: 多方會面時的正式介紹

lessons.english: I don't make promises I can't keep. You have my word.
lessons.chinese: 我不會做我做不到的承諾。我向你保證。

vocabulary.meaning: 我向你保證、我說到做到

lessons.scenario: 電影風格：取信對方、展現可靠的一幕

lessons.english: Here is my business card. I look forward to working with you.
lessons.chinese: 這是我的名片。我期待與您合作。
lessons.scenario: 商務場合遞交名片時的用語

lessons.english: Apparently, more plants are switching to automation to deal with labor shortages.
lessons.chinese: 看來越來越多工廠改用自動化，以因應缺工問題。
lessons.scenario: 討論產業趨勢時轉述自己看到的消息

lessons.english: Let's start today's morning briefing. What is the production output for Line 1?
lessons.chinese: 我們開始今天的早會。第一線的生產量是多少？
lessons.scenario: 每天早上召開生產例會時的開場

lessons.english: Honestly, this new packaging line is a real game changer for us.
lessons.chinese: 老實說，這條新包裝線對我們來說真的是個大突破。

vocabulary.meaning: 改變局面的關鍵、大突破

lessons.scenario: 向主管或客戶強調某項改變的重要性

lessons.english: We achieved 95% of our daily target. The remaining 5% was delayed due to a machine breakdown.
lessons.chinese: 我們達成了每日目標的95%。剩餘5%因機器故障而延誤。
lessons.scenario: 回報生產績效時的標準用語

lessons.english: Trust me. I've got a plan. Just follow my lead.
lessons.chinese: 相信我，我有計畫。跟著我做就對了。

vocabulary.meaning: 跟著我的步調、聽我指揮

lessons.scenario: 電影風格：關鍵時刻帶領夥伴行動

lessons.english: Please arrange for immediate maintenance on the extruder in Zone A.
lessons.chinese: 請立即安排成型區擠壓機的維修。
lessons.scenario: 指派維修任務時的指令

lessons.english: Experts say sustainability and cutting food waste are the biggest trends right now.
lessons.chinese: 專家說永續和減少食物浪費是目前最大的趨勢。
lessons.scenario: 引用專家觀點，讓談話更有說服力

lessons.english: The shift handover report must be completed before you leave.
lessons.chinese: 交班報告必須在你離開前完成。
lessons.scenario: 要求工班交接完成交班報告

lessons.english: Let's not reinvent the wheel. We can reuse last year's template.
lessons.chinese: 我們不用重新發明輪子，沿用去年的範本就好。
lessons.scenario: 提醒團隊不要重複造輪子、善用既有資源

lessons.english: We need to increase throughput by 10% this week to meet the customer order.
lessons.chinese: 本週我們需要提升10%的產能以完成客戶訂單。
lessons.scenario: 生產會議中討論目標調整

lessons.english: There's no turning back now. This is our shot. Make it count.
lessons.chinese: 現在沒有回頭路了。這是我們的機會，好好把握。
lessons.scenario: 電影風格：背水一戰前的決心宣言

lessons.english: Are there any safety concerns we need to address before starting the line?
lessons.chinese: 在開線前，有沒有需要處理的安全問題？
lessons.scenario: 開工前的安全確認程序

lessons.english: I read that weight-loss medications are really changing how people shop for food.
lessons.chinese: 我看到報導說，減重藥物正大幅改變人們購買食品的方式。
lessons.scenario: 分享自己讀到的健康消費趨勢

lessons.english: Our quality standard requires a defect rate of less than 0.5 percent.
lessons.chinese: 我們的品質標準要求不良率低於0.5%。
lessons.scenario: 向客戶或稽核員說明品質規格

lessons.english: No worries, I'll keep you in the loop on the supplier talks.
lessons.chinese: 別擔心，供應商談判的進度我會隨時讓你知道。
lessons.scenario: 答應同事會持續同步資訊時的輕鬆說法

lessons.english: This batch has been placed on hold pending a full inspection.
lessons.chinese: 這批貨已暫停出貨，等待全面檢驗。
lessons.scenario: 發現品質問題時的緊急處置措施

lessons.english: You did everything right. Sometimes things just fall apart.
lessons.chinese: 你已經盡力做對每件事了。有時候事情就是會出狀況。
lessons.scenario: 電影風格：安慰失意夥伴的溫柔一幕

lessons.english: We need to implement a corrective action plan within 24 hours.
lessons.chinese: 我們需要在24小時內實施矯正行動計畫。
lessons.scenario: 客訴或稽核後的改善回覆

lessons.english: What do you think about the new food safety rules on traceability?
lessons.chinese: 你怎麼看新的食品安全溯源規定？
lessons.scenario: 邀請對方對時事發表看法，延續對話

lessons.english: The sensory evaluation results show the product meets all specifications.
lessons.chinese: 品評結果顯示，產品符合所有規格。
lessons.scenario: 品評會議結論報告

lessons.english: It's crunch time before the audit, so let's roll up our sleeves.
lessons.chinese: 稽核前是衝刺的關鍵時刻，大家捲起袖子加油吧。
lessons.scenario: 重要期限前激勵團隊全力以赴

lessons.english: Please ensure all records are documented for the upcoming audit.
lessons.chinese: 請確保所有記錄均已建檔，以備即將到來的稽核。
lessons.scenario: 稽核前準備工作的叮嚀

lessons.english: This isn't just business anymore. Now it's personal.
lessons.chinese: 這已經不只是生意了。現在是私人恩怨。
lessons.scenario: 電影風格：衝突升高、立場轉變的張力台詞

lessons.english: I apologize for the inconvenience. We take full responsibility and will prevent recurrence.
lessons.chinese: 對造成的不便我深感抱歉。我們承擔全部責任，並將防止再發生。
lessons.scenario: 處理客戶投訴時的正式回應

lessons.english: Yeah, it's all over the news these days. Everyone's talking about it.
lessons.chinese: 對啊，這陣子新聞到處都在報，大家都在討論。
lessons.scenario: 附和對方、表示某話題正當紅
